'''鈭歵h-ch-m-m''' ('''kathachmemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quatch|quatch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-m-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quatch|quatch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ch-m-m
|-
! Lemma
| kathachmemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithachmemoko|thithachmemoko]] || [[word:jithachmemoko|jithachmemoko]] || [[word:shithachmemoko|shithachmemoko]] || [[word:kithachmemoko|kithachmemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthachmemoko|thuthuthachmemoko]] || [[word:jujuthachmemoko|jujuthachmemoko]] || [[word:shushuthachmemoko|shushuthachmemoko]] || [[word:kukuthachmemoko|kukuthachmemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthachmemoko|thuthachmemoko]] || [[word:juthachmemoko|juthachmemoko]] || [[word:shuthachmemoko|shuthachmemoko]] || [[word:kuthachmemoko|kuthachmemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthachmemoko|thuthachmemoko]] || [[word:juthachmemoko|juthachmemoko]] || [[word:shuthachmemoko|shuthachmemoko]] || [[word:kuthachmemoko|kuthachmemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethachmemoko|thethachmemoko]] || [[word:jethachmemoko|jethachmemoko]] || [[word:shethachmemoko|shethachmemoko]] || [[word:kethachmemoko|kethachmemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothachmemoko|thothothachmemoko]] || [[word:jojothachmemoko|jojothachmemoko]] || [[word:shoshothachmemoko|shoshothachmemoko]] || [[word:kokothachmemoko|kokothachmemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothachmemoko|thothachmemoko]] || [[word:jothachmemoko|jothachmemoko]] || [[word:shothachmemoko|shothachmemoko]] || [[word:kothachmemoko|kothachmemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothachmemoko|thothachmemoko]] || [[word:jothachmemoko|jothachmemoko]] || [[word:shothachmemoko|shothachmemoko]] || [[word:kothachmemoko|kothachmemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thachmemoko|th忙thachmemoko]] || [[word:j忙thachmemoko|j忙thachmemoko]] || [[word:sh忙thachmemoko|sh忙thachmemoko]] || [[word:k忙thachmemoko|k忙thachmemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathachmemoko|thathathachmemoko]] || [[word:jajathachmemoko|jajathachmemoko]] || [[word:shashathachmemoko|shashathachmemoko]] || [[word:kakathachmemoko|kakathachmemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathachmemoko|thathachmemoko]] || [[word:jathachmemoko|jathachmemoko]] || [[word:shathachmemoko|shathachmemoko]] || [[word:kathachmemoko|kathachmemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathachmemoko|thathachmemoko]] || [[word:jathachmemoko|jathachmemoko]] || [[word:shathachmemoko|shathachmemoko]] || [[word:kathachmemoko|kathachmemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathachmemithi|shathachmemithi]] || [[word:shathachmemiji|shathachmemiji]] || [[word:shathachmemishi|shathachmemishi]] || [[word:shathachmemiki|shathachmemiki]]
